blended.narrative: Welch Village is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: dry, highs of 42°F, winds around 21 mph.
Sunday: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
